title: Second Opinion
description: The golem has been tested with 2 ingredients. Identify the animators and determine what potion their mix would produce.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing6: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing2: chest=✗ ears=✓  →  ears_only
Chest reacts to G+L. Ears react to R+L. An animator needs BOTH. Cross-reference with untested ingredients.
